name: assets-mcp
description: Search and fetch design assets: icons, illustrations, fonts, photos, textures, 3D models, audio, sprites, and local game-art packs, with license metadata.
long_description:
An MCP server for design assets in design and development work — icons, illustrations, fonts, photos, textures, 3D models, audio, sprites, and local game-art packs, with license and attribution metadata throughout. The embedded icons/illustrations/fonts base and four keyless remote providers require no API keys; seven further opt-in keyed providers register only when their API key or flag is configured, adding more photos, 3D models, and audio.

**Key features:**

- **Icons** — 8 vendored Iconify sets (Bootstrap Icons, Feather, Heroicons, Lucide, Material Symbols, Phosphor, Simple Icons, Tabler), rendered to standalone SVG with optional color and size overrides, plus the full keyless Iconify remote catalogue
- **Illustrations** — 3 vendored CC0-1.0 SVG collections (Open Doodles, Humaaans, Open Peeps)
- **Fonts** — 14 OFL-1.1 font families as woff2 files, with optional @font-face CSS generation, plus the keyless Google Fonts catalogue
- **Photos** — keyless Openverse CC-licensed images, plus the opt-in Unsplash, Pixabay, and Pexels providers
- **Textures** — keyless ambientCG CC0 PBR material archives
- **3D models** — the opt-in Poly Pizza and Poly Haven providers
- **Audio** — the opt-in Jamendo and Freesound Creative-Commons audio providers (Freesound serves its high-quality preview, not the master file)
- **Local game art** — assetsdb sprite, model, audio, and font resources plus byte-identical original pack ZIP retrieval
- **License metadata** — every asset source carries its license and attribution, surfaced via `list_asset_sources`
- **Offline-capable** — a vendored icons/illustrations/fonts base is always embedded at build time; set `ASSETS_DISABLE_REMOTE=1` to disable the four keyless remote providers and run with no network calls at runtime

output_dir.title: Output Directory
output_dir.description: Directory to write rendered assets to (default: OS temp dir + /assets-mcp)

disable_remote.title: Disable Remote Providers
disable_remote.description: Set to 1 to disable the keyless remote providers and run fully offline

assets_db.title: Local assetsdb Database
assets_db.description: Path to an assetsdb database; local and available when remote providers are disabled

cache_dir.title: Cache Directory
cache_dir.description: On-disk cache dir for remote fetches (default: OS cache dir + /assets-mcp)

tools.name: list_asset_sources
tools.description: List asset providers and their sources with license and count; filter by kind, provider, or source

tools.name: search_icons
tools.description: Search icon sets (embedded + Iconify) by name; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_icon
tools.description: Render an icon to SVG by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_illustrations
tools.description: Search vendored illustration collections by name; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_illustration
tools.description: Fetch an SVG illustration by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_fonts
tools.description: Search font families (embedded + Google Fonts) by name, slug, or category; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_font
tools.description: Fetch a font's woff2 file (and optional @font-face CSS) by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_photos
tools.description: Search keyless Openverse CC-licensed photos by name; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_photo
tools.description: Fetch a photo by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_textures
tools.description: Search keyless CC0 ambientCG PBR material sets by name; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_texture
tools.description: Fetch a PBR material archive by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_models
tools.description: Search 3D model providers (Poly Pizza, Poly Haven) by name; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_model
tools.description: Fetch a 3D model by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_audio
tools.description: Search audio providers (Jamendo, Freesound) by name; returns composite ids

tools.name: get_audio
tools.description: Fetch an audio clip (mp3 or ogg) by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: search_sprites
tools.description: Search local assetsdb sprites with pack and atlas metadata

tools.name: get_sprite
tools.description: Fetch a sprite by composite id and write it to disk

tools.name: get_pack
tools.description: Copy a known assetsdb pack's original ZIP to disk
